relationships.context: V founded and works full-time on Careerspan (~2.5 years)
Identifies inability to self-articulate as the core choke point, not employer intent
Through Careerspan, coaches job seekers to surface evidence of skills via storytelling
Core methodology: guided storytelling to reveal skills invisible on resumes
Alternative/supplement to resume; surfaces what resumes miss
First iteration of product, built over ~2 years before pivot
Pivot away from the job-seeker-focused coaching app due to monetization challenges
Learned job seekers are difficult to monetize — limited ability/willingness to pay
